board_csa_architect.notes: is_sandbox column on organizations. Reporting queries need WHERE is_sandbox=false filter. Clean schema extension.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Sandbox data isolated by RLS. test_user credentials must not appear in production seed. Approve with standard credential rotation.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: Sandbox agents may carry vector steering data. No additional VRAM impact since sandbox runs same models.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Sandbox wipe/reset scripts needed. No production impact. Standard tenant provisioning via OPS-01.
